name: Aman Munjal
title: Founder & Lead Trainer
tagline: Clarity-first AI educator for students, engineers, and product leaders
imageAlt: Professional headshot of Aman Munjal, Founder and Lead Trainer at Verlin Labs
bio: I started Verlin Labs because I was tired of watching smart people nod along to AI explanations they did not actually follow. I have spent over a decade as a PM working on AI and fintech products, and I kept seeing the same gap: people who could use the tools but could not reason about them. Every program here is built around mental models first, so what you learn still holds up after the session ends and the tool has changed.

My sessions mix technical depth with a lot of trial and error in the classroom - I have rewritten most of these explanations three or four times based on what actually landed. Whether you are in school, in engineering college, or running a product team, I try to meet you where you are instead of where a slide deck assumes you are.

I teach the free introductory sessions myself, along with the full tracks and corporate workshops. One rule I try not to break: no jargon without an explanation, and no tool recommendation without context for why it matters.
credentials: Live instructor for free sessions & full programs
Curriculum design across student, engineer, and PM tracks
